Bash(bash /tmp/unity_mcp.sh "tools/call" '{"name":"execute_code","arguments":{"code":"var canvas = GameObject.Find\(\\"GameCanvas\\"\); var ui = canvas.GetComponent<UIController>\(\); var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder\(\); sb.AppendLine\(\\"Canvas active: \\" + canvas.activeSelf\); for\(int i=0; i<canvas.transform.childCount; i++\) { var child = canvas.transform.GetChild\(i\); sb.AppendLine\(child.name + \\" active:\\" + child.gameObject.activeSelf + \\" activeHier:\\" + child.gameObject.activeInHierarchy\); for\(int j=0; j<child.childCount; j++\) { var gc = child.GetChild\(j\); sb.AppendLine\(\\"  \\" + gc.name + \\" active:\\" + gc.gameObject.activeSelf\); } } return sb.ToString\(\);"}}')

Bash(bash /tmp/unity_mcp.sh "tools/call" '{"name":"execute_code","arguments":{"action":"execute","code":"var gm = GameObject.FindFirstObjectByType<GameManager>\(\); var ch = GameObject.FindFirstObjectByType<CollisionHandler>\(\); var car = GameObject.FindFirstObjectByType<CarController>\(\); var canvas = GameObject.Find\(\\"GameCanvas\\"\); var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder\(\); sb.AppendLine\(\\"GameState: \\" + gm.CurrentState\); sb.AppendLine\(\\"HP: \\" + ch.CurrentHP\); sb.AppendLine\(\\"Car pos: \\" + car.transform.position\); sb.AppendLine\(\\"Time.timeScale: \\" + Time.timeScale\); for\(int i=0; i<canvas.transform.childCount; i++\) { var child = canvas.transform.GetChild\(i\); for\(int j=0; j<child.childCount; j++\) { var gc = child.GetChild\(j\); if\(gc.gameObject.activeSelf\) sb.AppendLine\(\\"  ACTIVE: \\" + gc.name\); } } return sb.ToString\(\);"}}')

Bash(bash /tmp/unity_mcp.sh "tools/call" '{"name":"execute_code","arguments":{"action":"execute","code":"var cam = Camera.main; var car = GameObject.FindFirstObjectByType<CarController>\(\); var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder\(\); sb.AppendLine\(\\"Camera pos: \\" + cam.transform.position\); sb.AppendLine\(\\"Camera rot: \\" + cam.transform.eulerAngles\); sb.AppendLine\(\\"Car pos: \\" + car.transform.position\); sb.AppendLine\(\\"Car scale: \\" + car.transform.localScale\); var cf = cam.GetComponent<CameraFollow>\(\); if\(cf != null\) { sb.AppendLine\(\\"CameraFollow found\\"\); } var ch = GameObject.FindFirstObjectByType<CollisionHandler>\(\); sb.AppendLine\(\\"HP: \\" + ch.CurrentHP\); var gm = GameObject.FindFirstObjectByType<GameManager>\(\); sb.AppendLine\(\\"ElapsedTime: \\" + gm.ElapsedTime\); return sb.ToString\(\);"}}')

Bash(bash /tmp/unity_mcp.sh "tools/call" '{"name":"execute_code","arguments":{"action":"execute","code":"var cam = Camera.main; var cf = cam.GetComponent<CameraFollow>\(\); var targetField = cf.GetType\(\).GetField\(\\"_target\\", System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance\); var target = targetField.GetValue\(cf\) as Transform; return \\"Target: \\" + \(target != null ? target.name + \\" at \\" + target.position : \\"NULL - not assigned!\\"\);"}}')

Bash(bash /tmp/unity_mcp.sh "tools/call" '{"name":"execute_code","arguments":{"action":"execute","code":"var gm = GameObject.FindFirstObjectByType<GameManager>\(\); var ch = GameObject.FindFirstObjectByType<CollisionHandler>\(\); var car = GameObject.FindFirstObjectByType<CarController>\(\); var lm = GameObject.FindFirstObjectByType<LevelManager>\(\); var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder\(\); sb.AppendLine\(\\"=== GAMEPLAY STATUS ===\\"\); sb.AppendLine\(\\"State: \\" + gm.CurrentState\); sb.AppendLine\(\\"HP: \\" + ch.CurrentHP\); sb.AppendLine\(\\"Elapsed: \\" + gm.ElapsedTime.ToString\(\\"F1\\"\) + \\"s\\"\); sb.AppendLine\(\\"Car Z: \\" + car.transform.position.z.ToString\(\\"F0\\"\)\); sb.AppendLine\(\\"Car lane X: \\" + car.transform.position.x.ToString\(\\"F1\\"\)\); sb.AppendLine\(\\"TimeScale: \\" + Time.timeScale\); var pe = car.GetComponent<PowerUpEffect>\(\); if\(pe != null\) { var shieldField = pe.GetType\(\).GetField\(\\"_isShieldActive\\", System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance\); if\(shieldField != null\) sb.AppendLine\(\\"Shield: \\" + shieldField.GetValue\(pe\)\); } sb.AppendLine\(\\"TotalCoins: \\" + PlayerPrefs.GetInt\(\\"TotalCoins\\", 0\)\); return sb.ToString\(\);"}}')

Bash(bash /tmp/unity_mcp.sh "tools/call" '{"name":"execute_code","arguments":{"action":"execute","code":"var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder\(\);\\n\\n// 1. Add NearMissDetector to Car\\nvar car = GameObject.Find\(\\"Car\\"\);\\nvar nmd = car.GetComponent<NearMissDetector>\(\);\\nif\(nmd == null\) nmd = car.AddComponent<NearMissDetector>\(\);\\nsb.AppendLine\(\\"NearMissDetector: added to Car\\"\);\\n\\n// 2. Add SpeedLinesVFX to Main Camera\\nvar cam = Camera.main.gameObject;\\nvar slvfx = cam.GetComponent<SpeedLinesVFX>\(\);\\nif\(slvfx == null\) slvfx = cam.AddComponent<SpeedLinesVFX>\(\);\\n// Wire the car reference\\nvar carField = slvfx.GetType\(\).GetField\(\\"_car\\", System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance\);\\nif\(carField != null\) carField.SetValue\(slvfx, car.GetComponent<CarController>\(\)\);\\nsb.AppendLine\(\\"SpeedLinesVFX: added to Main Camera, car wired\\"\);\\n\\n// 3. Add CoinCollectVFX to a new manager object\\nvar vfxMgr = GameObject.Find\(\\"VFXManager\\"\);\\nif\(vfxMgr == null\) vfxMgr = new GameObject\(\\"VFXManager\\"\);\\nvar ccvfx = vfxMgr.GetComponent<CoinCollectVFX>\(\);\\nif\(ccvfx == null\) ccvfx = vfxMgr.AddComponent<CoinCollectVFX>\(\);\\nsb.AppendLine\(\\"CoinCollectVFX: added to VFXManager\\"\);\\n\\n// 4. Create DamageFlash UI setup\\nvar canvas = GameObject.Find\(\\"GameCanvas\\"\);\\nvar safeArea = canvas.transform.Find\(\\"SafeAreaPanel\\"\);\\nvar hudPanel = safeArea != null ? safeArea.Find\(\\"HUDPanel\\"\) : null;\\nvar flashParent = hudPanel != null ? hudPanel : \(safeArea != null ? safeArea : canvas.transform\);\\n\\n// Create the flash Image\\nvar flashGO = new GameObject\(\\"DamageFlashOverlay\\"\);\\nflashGO.transform.SetParent\(flashParent, false\);\\nvar flashRT = flashGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>\(\);\\nflashRT.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;\\nflashRT.anchorMax = Vector2.one;\\nflashRT.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;\\nflashRT.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;\\nvar flashImg = flashGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.Image>\(\);\\nflashImg.color = new Color\(1f, 0f, 0f, 0f\);\\nflashImg.raycastTarget = false;\\nsb.AppendLine\(\\"DamageFlash Image: created under \\" + flashParent.name\);\\n\\n// Add DamageFlash component\\nvar df = flashGO.AddComponent<DamageFlash>\(\);\\nvar flashField = df.GetType\(\).GetField\(\\"_flashImage\\", System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance\);\\nif\(flashField != null\) flashField.SetValue\(df, flashImg\);\\nsb.AppendLine\(\\"DamageFlash: component added and wired\\"\);\\n\\n// 5. Wire GameManager references\\nvar gm = GameObject.FindFirstObjectByType<GameManager>\(\);\\nvar dfField = gm.GetType\(\).GetField\(\\"_damageFlash\\", System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance\);\\nif\(dfField != null\) dfField.SetValue\(gm, df\);\\nsb.AppendLine\(\\"GameManager._damageFlash: wired\\"\);\\n\\n// Mark dirty and save\\nUnityEditor.EditorUtility.SetDirty\(car\);\\nUnityEditor.EditorUtility.SetDirty\(cam\);\\nUnityEditor.EditorUtility.SetDirty\(vfxMgr\);\\nUnityEditor.EditorUtility.SetDirty\(flashGO\);\\nUnityEditor.EditorUtility.SetDirty\(gm.gameObject\);\\nUnityEditor.SceneManagement.EditorSceneManager.SaveOpenScenes\(\);\\nsb.AppendLine\(\\"Scene saved!\\"\);\\n\\nreturn sb.ToString\(\);"}}')

Bash(bash /tmp/unity_mcp.sh "tools/call" '{"name":"execute_code","arguments":{"action":"execute","code":"var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder\(\);\\nvar asm = typeof\(CarController\).Assembly;\\n\\n// 1. NearMissDetector on Car\\nvar car = GameObject.Find\(\\"Car\\"\);\\nvar nmdType = asm.GetType\(\\"NearMissDetector\\"\);\\nvar nmd = car.GetComponent\(nmdType\);\\nif\(nmd == null\) nmd = car.AddComponent\(nmdType\);\\nsb.AppendLine\(\\"NearMissDetector: \\" + \(nmd != null ? \\"OK\\" : \\"FAIL\\"\)\);\\n\\n// 2. SpeedLinesVFX on Camera\\nvar cam = Camera.main.gameObject;\\nvar slType = asm.GetType\(\\"SpeedLinesVFX\\"\);\\nvar sl = cam.GetComponent\(slType\);\\nif\(sl == null\) sl = cam.AddComponent\(slType\);\\nvar carField = slType.GetField\(\\"_car\\", System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance\);\\nif\(carField != null\) carField.SetValue\(sl, car.GetComponent<CarController>\(\)\);\\nsb.AppendLine\(\\"SpeedLinesVFX: \\" + \(sl != null ? \\"OK, car wired\\" : \\"FAIL\\"\)\);\\n\\n// 3. CoinCollectVFX on VFXManager\\nvar vfxMgr = GameObject.Find\(\\"VFXManager\\"\);\\nif\(vfxMgr == null\) vfxMgr = new GameObject\(\\"VFXManager\\"\);\\nvar ccType = asm.GetType\(\\"CoinCollectVFX\\"\);\\nvar cc = vfxMgr.GetComponent\(ccType\);\\nif\(cc == null\) cc = vfxMgr.AddComponent\(ccType\);\\nsb.AppendLine\(\\"CoinCollectVFX: \\" + \(cc != null ? \\"OK\\" : \\"FAIL\\"\)\);\\n\\n// 4. DamageFlash - create UI overlay\\nvar canvas = GameObject.Find\(\\"GameCanvas\\"\);\\nvar safeArea = canvas.transform.Find\(\\"SafeAreaPanel\\"\);\\nvar flashParent = safeArea != null ? safeArea : canvas.transform;\\nvar flashGO = new GameObject\(\\"DamageFlashOverlay\\"\);\\nflashGO.transform.SetParent\(flashParent, false\);\\nvar flashRT = flashGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>\(\);\\nflashRT.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;\\nflashRT.anchorMax = Vector2.one;\\nflashRT.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;\\nflashRT.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;\\nvar flashImg = flashGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.Image>\(\);\\nflashImg.color = new Color\(1f, 0f, 0f, 0f\);\\nflashImg.raycastTarget = false;\\nvar dfType = asm.GetType\(\\"DamageFlash\\"\);\\nvar df = flashGO.AddComponent\(dfType\);\\nvar fiField = dfType.GetField\(\\"_flashImage\\", System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance\);\\nif\(fiField != null\) fiField.SetValue\(df, flashImg\);\\nsb.AppendLine\(\\"DamageFlash: \\" + \(df != null ? \\"OK, image wired\\" : \\"FAIL\\"\)\);\\n\\n// 5. Wire GameManager._damageFlash\\nvar gm = GameObject.FindFirstObjectByType<GameManager>\(\);\\nvar gmDfField = typeof\(GameManager\).GetField\(\\"_damageFlash\\", System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance\);\\nif\(gmDfField != null\) gmDfField.SetValue\(gm, df\);\\nsb.AppendLine\(\\"GameManager._damageFlash: wired\\"\);\\n\\n// Save scene\\nUnityEditor.EditorUtility.SetDirty\(car\);\\nUnityEditor.EditorUtility.SetDirty\(cam\);\\nUnityEditor.EditorUtility.SetDirty\(vfxMgr\);\\nUnityEditor.EditorUtility.SetDirty\(flashGO\);\\nUnityEditor.EditorUtility.SetDirty\(gm.gameObject\);\\nUnityEditor.SceneManagement.EditorSceneManager.SaveOpenScenes\(\);\\nsb.AppendLine\(\\"Scene saved!\\"\);\\n\\nreturn sb.ToString\(\);"}}')

Bash(bash /tmp/unity_mcp.sh "tools/call" '{"name":"execute_code","arguments":{"action":"execute","code":"var types = new[] { \\"NearMissDetector\\", \\"SpeedLinesVFX\\", \\"CoinCollectVFX\\", \\"DamageFlash\\" };\\nvar sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder\(\);\\nforeach\(var asm in System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.GetAssemblies\(\)\) {\\n  foreach\(var tn in types\) {\\n    var t = asm.GetType\(tn\);\\n    if\(t != null\) sb.AppendLine\(tn + \\" found in \\" + asm.GetName\(\).Name\);\\n  }\\n}\\nif\(sb.Length == 0\) sb.AppendLine\(\\"No types found!\\"\);\\nreturn sb.ToString\(\);"}}')

Bash(bash /tmp/unity_mcp.sh "tools/call" '{"name":"execute_code","arguments":{"action":"execute","code":"var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder\(\);\\nvar asm = typeof\(CarController\).Assembly;\\n\\nvar nmdType = asm.GetType\(\\"NearMissDetector\\"\);\\nvar slType = asm.GetType\(\\"SpeedLinesVFX\\"\);\\nvar ccType = asm.GetType\(\\"CoinCollectVFX\\"\);\\nvar dfType = asm.GetType\(\\"DamageFlash\\"\);\\n\\nsb.AppendLine\(\\"NearMissDetector: \\" + \(nmdType != null\)\);\\nsb.AppendLine\(\\"SpeedLinesVFX: \\" + \(slType != null\)\);\\nsb.AppendLine\(\\"CoinCollectVFX: \\" + \(ccType != null\)\);\\nsb.AppendLine\(\\"DamageFlash: \\" + \(dfType != null\)\);\\n\\nif\(nmdType == null || slType == null || ccType == null || dfType == null\) return sb.ToString\(\);\\n\\n// 1. NearMissDetector on Car\\nvar car = GameObject.Find\(\\"Car\\"\);\\nif\(car.GetComponent\(nmdType\) == null\) car.AddComponent\(nmdType\);\\nsb.AppendLine\(\\"Added NearMissDetector to Car\\"\);\\n\\n// 2. SpeedLinesVFX on Camera\\nvar cam = Camera.main.gameObject;\\nvar sl = cam.GetComponent\(slType\);\\nif\(sl == null\) sl = cam.AddComponent\(slType\);\\nvar carField = slType.GetField\(\\"_car\\", System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance\);\\nif\(carField != null\) carField.SetValue\(sl, car.GetComponent<CarController>\(\)\);\\nsb.AppendLine\(\\"Added SpeedLinesVFX to Camera, car wired\\"\);\\n\\n// 3. CoinCollectVFX on VFXManager\\nvar vfxMgr = GameObject.Find\(\\"VFXManager\\"\);\\nif\(vfxMgr == null\) vfxMgr = new GameObject\(\\"VFXManager\\"\);\\nif\(vfxMgr.GetComponent\(ccType\) == null\) vfxMgr.AddComponent\(ccType\);\\nsb.AppendLine\(\\"Added CoinCollectVFX to VFXManager\\"\);\\n\\n// 4. DamageFlash overlay\\nvar canvas = GameObject.Find\(\\"GameCanvas\\"\);\\nvar safeArea = canvas.transform.Find\(\\"SafeAreaPanel\\"\);\\nvar flashGO = new GameObject\(\\"DamageFlashOverlay\\"\);\\nflashGO.transform.SetParent\(safeArea != null ? safeArea : canvas.transform, false\);\\nvar rt = flashGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>\(\);\\nrt.anchorMin = Vector2.zero; rt.anchorMax = Vector2.one;\\nrt.offsetMin = Vector2.zero; rt.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;\\nvar img = flashGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.Image>\(\);\\nimg.color = new Color\(1f, 0f, 0f, 0f\);\\nimg.raycastTarget = false;\\nvar df = flashGO.AddComponent\(dfType\);\\nvar fiField = dfType.GetField\(\\"_flashImage\\", System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance\);\\nif\(fiField != null\) fiField.SetValue\(df, img\);\\nsb.AppendLine\(\\"Added DamageFlash overlay\\"\);\\n\\n// 5. Wire GameManager\\nvar gm = GameObject.FindFirstObjectByType<GameManager>\(\);\\nvar gmField = typeof\(GameManager\).GetField\(\\"_damageFlash\\", System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance\);\\nif\(gmField != null\) gmField.SetValue\(gm, df\);\\nsb.AppendLine\(\\"Wired GameManager._damageFlash\\"\);\\n\\n// Save\\nUnityEditor.EditorUtility.SetDirty\(car\);\\nUnityEditor.EditorUtility.SetDirty\(cam\);\\nUnityEditor.EditorUtility.SetDirty\(vfxMgr\);\\nUnityEditor.EditorUtility.SetDirty\(flashGO\);\\nUnityEditor.EditorUtility.SetDirty\(gm.gameObject\);\\nUnityEditor.SceneManagement.EditorSceneManager.SaveOpenScenes\(\);\\nsb.AppendLine\(\\"Scene saved!\\"\);\\n\\nreturn sb.ToString\(\);"}}')

Bash(bash /tmp/unity_mcp.sh "tools/call" '{"name":"execute_code","arguments":{"action":"execute","code":"var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder\(\);\\nvar asm = typeof\(CarController\).Assembly;\\n\\nvar car = GameObject.Find\(\\"Car\\"\);\\nsb.AppendLine\(\\"Car components:\\"\);\\nforeach\(var c in car.GetComponents<Component>\(\)\) sb.AppendLine\(\\"  \\" + c.GetType\(\).Name\);\\n\\nvar cam = Camera.main.gameObject;\\nsb.AppendLine\(\\"Camera components:\\"\);\\nforeach\(var c in cam.GetComponents<Component>\(\)\) sb.AppendLine\(\\"  \\" + c.GetType\(\).Name\);\\n\\nvar vfx = GameObject.Find\(\\"VFXManager\\"\);\\nif\(vfx != null\) { sb.AppendLine\(\\"VFXManager components:\\"\); foreach\(var c in vfx.GetComponents<Component>\(\)\) sb.AppendLine\(\\"  \\" + c.GetType\(\).Name\); }\\n\\nvar flash = GameObject.Find\(\\"DamageFlashOverlay\\"\);\\nif\(flash != null\) { sb.AppendLine\(\\"DamageFlashOverlay components:\\"\); foreach\(var c in flash.GetComponents<Component>\(\)\) sb.AppendLine\(\\"  \\" + c.GetType\(\).Name\); }\\n\\nreturn sb.ToString\(\);"}}')
